title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zoho Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zoho Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zoho Corporation in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zoho Corporation:
Zoho Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation!
